name: Process.Start with string concatenation
description: Passing concatenated strings to Process.Start allows command injection.
fixHint: Use ProcessStartInfo with explicit ArgumentList to avoid shell interpretation.

name: SqlCommand with string-concatenated SQL
description: Building SQL strings via concatenation allows SQL injection attacks.
fixHint: Use parameterised queries with SqlParameter objects.

name: Use of MD5
description: MD5 is cryptographically broken and unsuitable for security-sensitive hashing.

name: Use of SHA1
description: SHA1 is considered weak for collision resistance.

name: Use of DES or TripleDES
description: DES and TripleDES have insufficient key sizes and known weaknesses.
